change.item: Redesigned Heavy grid as CSS tree lines with continuous vertical branches and hover highlighting.
Added a text excerpt frame option under Post excerpt - text.
Text post excerpts can now be shown either without a frame or with a compact framed bubble.

fix.item: Heavy grid now keeps visual branches for posts whose original parent is no longer visible in the current topic after moderation.
Preserve line breaks in text post excerpts and remove extra blank lines between real lines.

change.item: Display text post excerpts as compact tooltip-style bubbles.
Clarify that TreeK can normally be updated by installing the new package over the existing one.

addition.item: Split TreeK into Free and Pro editions.
Added Free package build and TreeK Free update server metadata.
